# Hellas Reform

> Architecture and total renovations in Thessaloniki and Central Macedonia — for homes, apartments and commercial spaces. Custom carpentry and metal constructions, prime kitchens and bathrooms, project management and permits, from first idea to handover. One responsible contact throughout. TCG registered.

> Η Hellasreform προσφέρει αρχιτεκτονική και ολικές ανακαινίσεις στη Θεσσαλονίκη και την Κεντρική Μακεδονία — για κατοικίες, διαμερίσματα και επαγγελματικούς χώρους. Ξυλουργικές και μεταλλικές κατασκευές, prime κουζίνες και μπάνια, διαχείριση έργου και άδειες, με μία υπεύθυνη επαφή. Εγγεγραμμένοι στο ΤΕΕ. Δωρεάν προσφορά.

Brand: Hellas Reform (one-word wordmark: Hellasreform). This site is Hellas Reform Thessaloniki, part of the Hellas Reform network.

## Contact

- Website: https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/
- Email: info@hellasreform.gr
- Phone: +30 694 914 07 72
- Location: Karolou Ntil 31-33, Thessaloniki 546 23, Greece

## Services

- Total renovation & project management — complete renovations for homes, apartments and commercial spaces, from first concept to handover
- Architecture & design — architecture, layout, material direction and design decisions for renovation projects
- Prime kitchens & bathrooms — kitchens and bathrooms designed as central parts of the renovation
- Custom carpentry & metal constructions — bespoke wardrobes, storage, built-ins, furniture and custom metal constructions
- Technical checks & permits — technical checks, permit coordination and engineer procedures

## Pages

- [Home](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/): Services, process, gallery and contact form
- [Blog](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/): Renovation guides and articles for Thessaloniki
- [Cities / Πόλεις](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/cities/): Service areas
- [Partners / Συνεργάτες](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/partners/): Collaborating professionals

## Blog Articles

- [Άδεια Ανακαίνισης Θεσσαλονίκη: Πλήρης Οδηγός](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/adeia-anakainisis-thessaloniki/): When you need a small-scale works permit or building permit for renovation in Thessaloniki and Central Macedonia, and what documents are required.
- [Ανακαίνιση Airbnb Χαλκιδική: Κανόνες & Κόστος 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-airbnb-chalkidiki/): Airbnb property renovation in Chalkidiki: 2026 regulations, fire safety, energy certificates, upgrade costs and practical tips.
- [Ανακαίνιση Διαμερίσματος Θεσσαλονίκη 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-diamerismatos-thessaloniki/): Apartment renovation in Thessaloniki: building regulations, permitted work hours, permits, insurance and what to know before starting.
- [Ανακαίνιση Επαγγελματικού Χώρου Θεσσαλονίκη 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-epaggelmatikou-xorou-thessaloniki/): Commercial space renovation in Thessaloniki, offices, shops, restaurants and clinics: cost per sqm, permits and accessibility, timelines and how to renovate with minimal downtime.
- [Ανακαίνιση Κουζίνας Χαλκιδική: Τιμές 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-kouzinas-chalkidiki/): Kitchen renovation prices in Chalkidiki 2026: material options, ergonomic design, appliances and custom-built solutions.
- [Ανακαίνιση Μπάνιου Θεσσαλονίκη: Κόστος 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-mpaniou-thessaloniki/): Bathroom renovation costs in Thessaloniki 2026: waterproofing, timeline, trade coordination and tips for getting accurate quotes.
- [Ανακαίνιση Νεοκλασικού Θεσσαλονίκη: Οδηγός 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainisi-neoklasiki-katoikia/): Guide to renovating a neoclassical home in Thessaloniki while preserving architectural features, approvals and modern upgrades.
- [Ανακαινίζω Νοικιάζω 2026: Οδηγός Επιδότησης](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/anakainizo-noikiazo-2026/): Anakainizo-Noikiazo 2026 subsidy guide: up to 40% funding for rental property renovation in Thessaloniki, eligibility and application steps.
- [Ειδικές Ξυλουργικές Κατασκευές Θεσσαλονίκη](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/eidiki-kataskevi-epipla/): Custom carpentry in Thessaloniki: built-in wardrobes, bookshelves, wall panelling and storage designed for your space.
- [Εξοικονομώ & Ενεργειακή Αναβάθμιση Θεσσαλονίκη](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/exoikonomo-energeiaki-anakainisi/): Exoikonomw energy upgrade guide for Thessaloniki homes: windows, insulation, heating systems and preparing your application.
- [Έξυπνο Σπίτι & Ανακαίνιση Θεσσαλονίκη: Οδηγός 2026](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/exypno-spiti-anakainisi/): Smart home guide for Thessaloniki renovations: lighting, heating, shading, security and networking integration.
- [Κόστος Ανακαίνισης Θεσσαλονίκη 2026: Τιμές ανά τ.μ.](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/kostos-anakainisis-thessaloniki-2026/): Renovation costs in Thessaloniki 2026: price per sqm, trade costs, materials and hidden expenses. Complete pricing guide.
- [Ολική Ανακαίνιση Θεσσαλονίκη: Κόστος & Διαδικασία](https://thessaloniki.hellasreform.gr/blog/oliki-anakainisi-thessaloniki/): Full renovation guide for Thessaloniki: cost per sqm, work sequence, timeline and project management.
